mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO companies
name, description, industry, size, city, address, logo_url, license_url, audit_status, job_count, job_confirm, financing_stage, official_web, phone, user_id, created_at, updated_at,
#{name}, #{description}, #{industry}, #{size}, #{city}, #{address}, #{logoUrl}, #{licenseUrl}, #{auditStatus}, #{jobCount}, #{jobConfirm}, #{financingStage}, #{officialWeb}, #{phone}, #{userId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt},
mapper.update:
UPDATE companies
name = #{name},
description = #{description},
industry = #{industry},
size = #{size},
city = #{city},
address = #{address},
logo_url = #{logoUrl},
license_url = #{licenseUrl},
audit_status = #{auditStatus},
audit_remark = #{auditRemark},
job_count = #{jobCount},
job_confirm = #{jobConfirm},
financing_stage = #{financingStage},
official_web = #{officialWeb},
phone = #{phone},
user_id = #{userId},
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT industry FROM companies WHERE industry IS NOT NULL AND industry != ''
SELECT DISTINCT size FROM companies WHERE size IS NOT NULL AND size != ''
